defect: foam where fire-rated sealant required (ID by color/label)
prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. title: Compliance check: Fireblocking & draftstopping (service call)
